nasb.text: He named the place Massah and Meribah because of the quarrel of the sons of Israel, and because they tested the Lord, saying, “Is the Lord among us, or not?”

esv.text: And he called the name of the place Massah and Meribah, because of the quarreling of the people of Israel, and because they tested the Lord by saying, “Is the Lord among us or not?”

cnv.text: 他給那地方起名叫瑪撒，又叫米利巴，因為以色列人在那裡爭吵，又因為他們試探耶和華，說：“耶和華是不是在我們中間呢？”

ccb.text: 摩西称那地方为玛撒和米利巴，因为百姓在那里吵闹，又试探耶和华，说：“耶和华真的在我们当中吗？”
